understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to complete all levels of the KA59 puzzle by maneuvering one or more selectable pieces (P or S) onto every goal tile (+) simultaneously within each level, achieving a WIN condition per level to progress through the total levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) in the specified direction using pixel coordinates (3 pixels per cell); adjacent pushable objects (like B blocks) can be pushed along if space allows; walls (#) and boundaries often block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) by targeting its exact pixel position [x,y]; all goals must be occupied simultaneously by pieces for WIN, with finite steps per level.
